name: Savvy Wealth
ai_strategy_summary: Savvy Wealth is an AI-powered RIA platform that grew AUM more than 500% to $2B since early 2024, with some advisors reclaiming 19 hours/week via AI-automated admin — backed by $72M Series B from Industry Ventures.
headline_metric: 19 hours/week reclaimed per advisor; AUM up 500% to $2B+ since early 2024 via AI-powered RIA model
headline_initiative: AI-powered RIA platform with predictive client intelligence and automated admin

advisor_productivity.headline: AI automation reclaims 19 hours/week per advisor via automated admin, compliance, and client prep
advisor_productivity.detail: Savvy Wealth's platform automates advisor admin tasks, compliance checks, and client meeting prep using AI — with some advisors reporting 19 hours/week reclaimed. The platform builds AI-personalized knowledge bases on each client for predictive intelligence.
evidence: $500M in new assets added in 2025 alone
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: AI-powered RIA platforms are dramatically reducing the cost per client served while improving personalization. JPM's advisor compensation model must evolve alongside AI productivity gains.

sources.name: Business Wire — Savvy Wealth Raises $72M Series B (Jul 2, 2025)

client_personalization.headline: Predictive real-time client intelligence with AI-personalized knowledge bases
client_personalization.detail: Savvy builds a continuously updated AI knowledge base on each client — combining financial data, life events, and behavioral signals to generate predictive real-time intelligence for advisors before every client touchpoint.
evidence: $72M Series B led by Industry Ventures (July 2025)
client_personalization.jpm_implication: Client-specific AI knowledge bases represent a step-change in advisor preparation quality. JPM's advisor support tools should aspire to this level of pre-meeting intelligence.

sources.name: Business Wire — Savvy Wealth Raises $72M Series B (Jul 2, 2025)

new_business_models.headline: AI-powered RIA rollup model — acquiring advisors and converting them to AI-augmented practices
new_business_models.detail: Savvy is executing an AI-powered advisor acquisition strategy — recruiting independent advisors and migrating them onto its AI platform, effectively running an AI-enabled RIA rollup.
evidence: AUM grown 500%+ via advisor acquisition + AI model
July 2025 $72M Series B to continue expansion
new_business_models.jpm_implication: AI-enabled RIA rollup models are growing AUM at rates that traditional wirehouse models cannot match. This is a structural threat to JPM's advisor recruitment pipeline.

sources.name: Business Wire — Savvy Wealth Raises $72M Series B (Jul 2, 2025)
